fields.description: The L4 service class this mapping forwards. Part of the {protocol}-{public_port} name.
fields.label: Protocol

fields.description: The public port allocated from the pool (read-only). The proxy listens on it and forwards to the backend.
fields.label: Public Port

fields.description: Inactive mappings are excluded from the desired port map the proxy serves (the row keeps its port).
fields.label: Active

fields.description: The backend VM this port forwards to. The proxy dials its guest IPv6 at the target port.
fields.label: Virtual Machine

fields.description: The backend service port on the VM (e.g. 22 for ssh, 3306 for mariadb). Fixed once chosen.
fields.label: Target Port

fields.description: The target VM's routing IPv6 /128, denormalized so the desired map is a single query with no join. Kept in sync with the mirror on save.
fields.label: Address
